name: cleaner
note: Fix missing / definition-like translations on flagged words.

name: translation
note: Active quality pass: main translation + complete meaning list. Wins over the cleaner layers.

name: split
note: Promote a word's distinct practiceable meanings into their own production cards (altMeanings); the reference meaning list (subDefinitions) is repartitioned wholesale, promoted meanings removed.

name: senses
note: Partition each ambiguous English phrase (>=2 producing meaning-slots, incl. promoted altMeanings) into senses + a short production gloss. Sole gloss authority: primaries carry it on `sense`, promoted altMeanings carry `gloss` (stamped by the reducer, §12). Single-sense synonym groups stay gloss-free. Orthogonal field — never conflicts.

name: examples
note: Sense-specific example sentences for ambiguous words.

name: manual-examples
note: Human example overrides — win over the LLM example-writer (60). Resolved on the example axis, NOT via the decisions collapse that layer 90 joins: an example is orthogonal to a word's translation/subDefinitions, and a 90 record shadows lower decisions layers wholesale (it would silently revert a translation fix while overriding an example). Clobber-proof: no example-writer run (targeted, stale, reconcile, or full sweep) can override it. Flat string[] → primary card; sense-tagged [{text, meaningKey}] → the matching promoted meaning (per-sense, §4.8).

name: manual-flags
note: Human render-flag overrides. enProper marks an English translation as a proper noun (name) so the renderer omits the indefinite article (May, December, English, Islam — not 'a May'); enUncountable supplements the translation curator (40) for missed mass nouns (a knowledge → knowledge). Resolved on its OWN axis (like manual-examples 70), NOT via the decisions collapse: a render flag is orthogonal to a word's translation/subDefinitions, so it never shadows a lower-layer fix the way a 90-manual record would. Files ARE the flags (no runs ledger).

name: manual
note: Human overrides — highest precedence. May also author a meaning split (decision: split with altMeanings + a repartitioned subDefinitions), overriding the split layer. Examples are NOT here — they resolve on their own axis via layer 70 (manual-examples).
